_comment: The REVIEW artifact for a FABRICATION: the SAME declared view as context-view-resident.json EXCEPT body_digest is a value that is NOT the re-fold of the source. The span is resident (source_digest_now == source.digest) and the source re-folds to refold_digest, but body_digest != refold_digest — what the reader SEES is not a witnessed sub-slice of the current source. A lossless 'snippet' that does not re-fold is a fabrication => deny(UNWITNESSED_FOLD), whatever the body claims. This is the safety lens: a laundered or invented body cannot pass as a fold of the append-only log. The witness discloses only the two digests' disagreement, never the bytes.
witness: body digest != re-fold of the current source: a fabrication, refused
